summary: The Optimism receipt proof divergence is rustfmt-only condition wrapping and semicolon insertion in Regolith/Canyon receipt-root returns; no proof behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 212: M	crates/optimism/consensus/src/proof.rs.
The isolated patch wraps Regolith/Canyon boolean conditions and adds semicolons to early `ordered_trie_root_with_encoder` returns.
No receipt nonce stripping, bloom handling, encoding, or trie-root calculation behavior changed.
